national_coordination: Official handover of 1,800 motorcycles by the central government to the DPS Ituri and SGI. Arrival of the national delegation of the Safety and Security Unit of SGI/MVE. Support to the laboratory pillar for data harmonization.

Expert meeting held for in-depth analysis to guide the response. | Support to pillars on the use of image boxes during community relay briefings. | Dispatching of response actors across health zones and assessment of additional needs in line with epidemic dynamics. | Orientation meeting held with the DG INSP, Incident Manager (IM), Deputy IM and COUSP coordinators. | Discussion between the IM and the Operations Officer on modelling.

Tripartite meeting between the Ministry of Health, Hygiene and Social Welfare (through COUSP/INSP and SGI), the Ministry of Higher and University Education, Scientific Research and Innovations, and the Ministry of National Education and New Citizenship — on integrating school, university and academic response activities into the 17th epidemic preparedness and response plan. Joint mission (INSP, WHO, UNICEF, WFP) to Mongbwalu to evaluate the response and engage community leaders. Start of the work to develop the consolidated operational plan (CONOPS). Sharing of the provincial operational plan and follow-up of travellers under quarantine. Coordination meetings to address security constraints linked to ADF incursions. Meeting with the Provincial Governor; recommendation of direct financing of activities to motivate providers. Health Cluster meeting held to discuss mobility challenges.
